title: schoenus lanatus
intro: Schoenus lanatus, also known as the Woolly Bog-rush, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schoenus lanatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
